---
title: "About"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="about-content">
  <img src="images/headshot.jpg" alt="Michael Lopez" class="headshot" onerror="this.style.background='linear-gradient(135deg, #8B4D3B 0%, #C4724D 100%)'; this.style.display='block';">

  <h2>Hi, I'm Michael</h2>

  <p>
    I build data systems that help communities. As Director of Data at Child Poverty Action Lab,
    I've spent nearly six years designing infrastructure that turns administrative data into
    action—from eviction records that connect families to legal aid, to tools that help
    organizations identify residents eligible for housing assistance.
  </p>

  <p>
    My background in psychology, anthropology, and public policy shaped how I approach this work.
    I'm most effective at the intersection of technical and programmatic—translating between
    technical teams and community stakeholders, ensuring analytical rigor while keeping the
    focus on real-world impact.
  </p>

  <h3>What I've Built</h3>

  <p>
    At CPAL, I've led the development of data infrastructure that serves real community needs:
  </p>

  <ul>
    <li>Data pipelines processing 40,000+ eviction records annually, used by partners including Dallas Eviction Advocacy Center and Eviction Lab</li>
    <li>30+ interactive dashboards (R Shiny) informing decisions on housing stability, public safety, and resource allocation</li>
    <li>Project management systems and operational processes now used org-wide</li>
    <li>Currently leading migration to Databricks, systematizing 35-40 data pipelines for long-term scale</li>
  </ul>

  <h3>Technical Skills</h3>

  <div class="skills-grid">
    <div class="skill-category">
      <h4>Languages & Analytics</h4>
      <ul>
        <li>R (tidyverse, sf, ggplot2)</li>
        <li>SQL</li>
        <li>Python</li>
        <li>Statistical Modeling</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="skill-category">
      <h4>Data Infrastructure</h4>
      <ul>
        <li>Databricks</li>
        <li>ETL / Data Pipelines</li>
        <li>Git / CI/CD</li>
        <li>CKAN / Jenkins</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="skill-category">
      <h4>Visualization & Apps</h4>
      <ul>
        <li>R Shiny</li>
        <li>Tableau</li>
        <li>Quarto</li>
        <li>Leaflet / Mapbox</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="skill-category">
      <h4>Domain Expertise</h4>
      <ul>
        <li>Housing & Eviction</li>
        <li>Public Safety</li>
        <li>Social Policy</li>
        <li>Community Development</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>

  <h3>Let's Connect</h3>

  <p>
    I'm always interested in connecting with others working at the intersection of data,
    technology, and social impact.
  </p>

  <p>
    <a href="mailto:lopezmikeok@gmail.com">lopezmikeok@gmail.com</a><br>
    <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/michael-d-lopez" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a> ·
    <a href="https://github.com/lopezmichael" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
  </p>
</div>
```
